steps.title: Factor and complete the square
steps.content:
To convert to vertex form, factor 7 from the $x$ terms:
$$y = 7\left(x^2 - \frac{b}{7}x\right) - 6$$
To complete the square, find half the coefficient of $x$ and square it. Half of $-\frac{b}{7}$ is $-\frac{b}{14}$, squared is $\frac{b^2}{196}$. Therefore:
$$x^2 - \frac{b}{7}x = \left(x - \frac{b}{14}\right)^2 - \frac{b^2}{196}$$

steps.title: Substitute back and simplify
steps.content:
Substitute into the original equation:
$$y = 7\left[\left(x - \frac{b}{14}\right)^2 - \frac{b^2}{196}\right] - 6$$
Distribute the 7:
$$y = 7\left(x - \frac{b}{14}\right)^2 - 7 \cdot \frac{b^2}{196} - 6$$
Simplify $7 \cdot \frac{b^2}{196} = \frac{b^2}{28}$:
$$y = 7\left(x - \frac{b}{14}\right)^2 - \frac{b^2}{28} - 6$$
That matches choice A — A is correct.
